sanskrit:
ऊर्ध्वं गच्छन्ति सत्त्वस्था मध्ये तिष्ठन्ति राजसाः।
जघन्यगुणवृत्तिस्था अधो गच्छन्ति तामसाः॥
transliteration: ūrdhvaṃ gacchanti sattvasthā madhye tiṣṭhanti rājasāḥ | jaghanya-guṇa-vṛtti-sthā adho gacchanti tāmasāḥ ||
literal_meaning: Those established in sattva go upward; the rajasic remain in the middle; those rooted in the lowest (tāmasic) qualities and behaviors go downward.
contextual_meaning: Inner qualities create life trajectories: clarity lifts us, desire keeps us treading water, and apathy drags us into self-defeating loops.
psychological_state: A motivational schema: sustained attentional focus (sattva) predicts upward growth; intermittent reward-seeking (rajas) predicts horizontal oscillation; chronic avoidance and dullness (tamas) predicts downward spirals.
trigger_scenario: Scrolling social media for hours, feeling numb and heavy, then realizing the algorithm is feeding darker content—an embodied 'descent' into lower mood states.
anchor_text: Your inner state shapes your path: clarity rises, desire stalls, apathy sinks.
